problem: Are NP-complete problems solvable in polynomial time — P vs NP unsolved
mechanism: Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics
hypothesis: The key to Are NP-complete problems solvable in polynomial time — P vs NP unsolved is Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics — specifically Monte Carlo tree — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.
